description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:slim-bookworm image with a global before_script that installs build-essential, pkg-config and libssl-dev and sets up the specified RUST_VERSION via rustup, define stages check, build, test, release and package and a cache keyed by $CI_PIPELINE_ID-$RUST_VERSION covering the cargo registry, rustup toolchains and target directory. In the check stage add four jobs (check-beta, check-msrv, check-nightly, check-stable) that run the shared script of multiple cargo check commands with the appropriate RUST_VERSION variable. In the build stage add build-x86_64-linux-gnu (cargo build --target=$RUST_TARGET --release, move and strip the binary, artifact named ffsend-x86_64-linux-gnu) and build-x86_64-linux-musl (install musl target, compile OpenSSL statically, cargo build, strip, artifact named ffsend-x86_64-linux-musl). In the test stage add test-cargo (cargo test --verbose) and test-public (using alpine:latest, move the musl binary, upload a random file, download it via history, compare files and clean up). In the release stage add release-crate (login to crates.io with $CARGO_TOKEN and cargo publish), release-docker (docker:git image with docker:dind service, retag and push to Docker Hub using $DOCKER_USER/$DOCKER_PASSWORD), release-github (install github-release tool and upload binaries to a GitHub release), release-snap (snapcore/snapcraft image to build and push a snap package) and finally a package-aur job (archlinux image, runs only on version tags, computes SHA256 checksums of release assets, updates PKGBUILDs, builds AUR packages and pushes them via SSH using $AUR_SSH_PRIVATE).
